name: Schwalbennester (Barvarian Veal)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Veal; Cut In 4 Thin Slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat veal dry with paper towels.
2. Mix salt, sugar, white pepper, and mustard together.
3. Roll the veal slices in the seasoning mixture.
4. Place a bacon slice on top of each piece of veal.
5. Place an unsliced egg on top of the bacon.
6. Roll up each slice of veal (jelly-roll fashion) and tie with string.
7. Heat oil in a frying pan and brown the rolls well on all sides.
8. Add onion to the pan and sauté for 3 minutes.
9. Add hot bouillon, cover, and simmer gently for 25 minutes.
10. Remove veal from the pan; remove strings and keep warm on serving platter.
11. Add tomato paste to pan drippings; stir.
12. Mix flour and red wine in a bowl until smooth.
13. Stir this mixture into the sauce and cook until thickened.
14. Add warmed veal rolls and heat through.
15. Before serving, place rolls on a platter and pour sauce over them. Serve with mashed potatoes.
